personalInfo.name: Chinmaya Behera
personalInfo.title: Researcher in Economics & Finance
personalInfo.bio: Expert in Digital Finance, Inflation Dynamics, and Financial Inclusion with a focus on empirical analysis of the Indian economy. Committed to bridging the gap between technological advancement and macroeconomic stability.

researchInterests.title: Digital Finance
researchInterests.description: Investigating how digital payment systems and fintech impact traditional banking and economic growth.

researchInterests.title: Inflation Dynamics
researchInterests.description: Analyzing price discovery and inflation stickiness in the era of digital transactions.

researchInterests.title: Financial Inclusion
researchInterests.description: Exploring the role of banking expansion and digital access in marginalized communities.

publications.title: Digital Finance and Inflation: An Empirical Analysis from Twelve Selected Indian States
publications.authors: Barik, R., Behera, C., & Patra, T.

publications.title: Analyzing the progress and prospects of financial inclusion in India
